title: aster psychensis
intro: Aster psychensis, also known as the Mexican daisy or prairie aster, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aster psychensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
